rationale: The tokens form a coherent Linear system — near-black canvas with a disciplined 4-step surface ladder, a single scarce lavender-blue accent, hairline-border depth (shadowOpacity 0), and consistent spacing/radius/type scales that the tile HTML applies faithfully across hero, type scale, palette, and product-card samples. No visible hard-fail: layout is clean, accent is used sparingly, and the artifact reads as an authentic, presentation-ready design foundation.
